g.text: clean chunk z2 (-> goes back into the sequence above)
velocity head -> predicted v_theta (OUT: same shape as z2)
IN: noised chunk z2^(s) (pure noise at s=0)
then a2: the SAME DiT denoises the action chunk
conditioned on the just-made z2 (inverse dynamics) · s: 0 -> 1
AUTOREGRESSIVE sequence — generate chunk by chunk:
chunk t+1 attends <= t · KV-cache holds the clean past (z1,a1)
DiT block x30 (the same shared block)
DIFFUSION within the chunk — flow-matching denoise:
Read it as: AR is the SEQUENCE axis (interleave z & a, causal, KV-cache, chunk by chunk); DIFFUSION is the WITHIN-CHUNK axis (denoise each chunk through the DiT, s -> AdaLN). One DiT
WITHIN-CHUNK axis (diffusion): each chunk starts as noise and is denoised by the DiT (timestep s -> AdaLN). Video frames shown as image thumbnails, actions as value
SEQUENCE axis (autoregressive): video frames (z) and action chunks (a) interleave into one causal sequence, generated chunk by chunk; KV-cache holds the clean past.
Fig 10 · LingBot-VA = AR x diffusion — generate one interleaved video+action sequence, each chunk denoised by the DiT
